_comment: Copy this to web/data/positions.local.json (gitignored) and fill in your real lots. It enables the cost-basis trim rule (>2x cost AND >50x forward) and the live sleeve-cap trigger (>~$1.72mm). 'forward_pe' is optional — the scanner fetches it when a free source allows; set it here to override. 'cash_usd' is dry powder counted toward the sleeve value. Nothing here is ever committed.
